data.body: S5 (dfb9) CLAIMED. Physically relocate 8 vendor modules (acli.py,acli_cli_ops.py,acli_graph.py,acli_rest.py,acli_subprocess.py,adf.py,outbound_fields.py,comment_limits.py) into adapters/jira/; teach loader relative subpath for 3 location-pinned (adf/outbound_fields/comment_limits); update all import refs (dotted+sibling+by-path) incl differ modules still importing outbound_fields at root (4af8 deferred); migrate ~29 test path constants/imports; NO re-export shims; behavior-preserving. Oracle=full suite green + structural grep gate (zero old-root-path refs).
